/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/print_config.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/quad2xml.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/xml2flow.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/xml2quad.cc.o ../../lib/quad/CMakeFiles/quad.dir/quad.cc.o ../../lib/opt/CMakeFiles/opt.dir/defusechain.cc.o ../../lib/opt/CMakeFiles/opt.dir/loopheaderwithflow.cc.o ../../lib/opt/CMakeFiles/opt.dir/loopinductionbasic.cc.o ../../lib/opt/CMakeFiles/opt.dir/loopinductionderived.cc.o ../../lib/opt/CMakeFiles/opt.dir/loopinductionelimination.cc.o ../../lib/opt/CMakeFiles/opt.dir/loopinductionopt.cc.o ../../lib/opt/CMakeFiles/opt.dir/loopoptanalysis.cc.o ../../lib/opt/CMakeFiles/opt.dir/loopoptreport.cc.o ../../lib/opt/CMakeFiles/opt.dir/loopstrengthreduction.cc.o ../../vendor/tinyxml2/CMakeFiles/vendor_xml.dir/tinyxml2.cc.o -o main  ../../lib/quadflow/libquadflow.a
